memory:memory/2026-03-11.md:1:1.snippet:
# Security Audit - 2026-03-11

Ran deep audit per daily reminder.

**Findings:**
- 3 critical (Telegram groupPolicy open + elevated/runtime tools; credentials perms fixed).
- 2 warn (trusted proxies, multi-user heuristic).
- Update available (2026.3.8).

**Actions:**
- Fixed credentials dir perms: chmod 700 ~/.openclaw/credentials.
- Cron jobs active: security-audit, update-status (daily ~2AM PT).

OS: Linux WSL2. Gateway loopback. No host firewall detected (ufw/firewalld absent).

Other fixes need config review (e.g., Telegram groupPolicy=allowlist).

---
